name: Research & Report Generator
description: RAG-powered research agent that retrieves documents from a Bedrock Knowledge Base, answers questions with citations, and generates structured reports. Includes both Strands and LangGraph implementations.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the RAG agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pattern. The agent searches a Bedrock Knowledge Base for relevant documents, answers questions with citations, and generates structured reports. Use this when your agent needs to ground responses in your organization's documents.

learn_more.title: AWS Sample: Bedrock KB RAG Workshop

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container

parameters.name: knowledge_base_id
parameters.description: Bedrock Knowledge Base ID to retrieve documents from
